prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科组（含物理类）最低位次分别为约4864→4805→6481→5220→3917名。2023年出现明显后移（6481名），2024年回升至5220名，2025年大幅前移至39 17名，近两年呈前移趋势，2025年基准约3917名；该校在安徽省理科组招生计划：2021年107人、2022年107人、2023年104人、2024年124人、2025年146人，逐 年扩招；2026年计划131人，较2025年减少15人（缩招约10.3%），缩招将加剧竞争，推动位次前移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 哈尔滨工业大学（威海）为985工程、211工程、双一 流建设高校，共享哈工大品牌；软科中国大学排名中哈尔滨工业大学2026年位列第12名，近年排名稳中有升（2021年第11→2025年第14→2026年第12），学校层次极高；哈工大（校本部）第五轮学科评估A-及以上学科达17个，包括力学、机械工程、材料科学与工程、环境科学与工程 （A+），以及计算机科学与技术、控制科学与工程、软件工程（A）等，与威海校区招生专业高度关联，对工科考生吸引力强；2026年声誉评价为中性/混合，无明显负面舆情冲击；抖音热度排名总榜第10位（高热），短视频曝光量高，反映报考关注度持续升温；2024年曾有投档线异常的中关注信 号，但2025年已无异常记录，整体声誉稳定。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信 、电气工程及其自动化等专业在2024–2026年均为高热推荐/推荐，社会热度持续高位；安徽省2026年高考总人数约45.1万，较2025年（46.2万）略有减少，物理类估算约30.9万， 较2025年（32.1万）减少约3.7%，竞争略有缓解。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅前移的强势走势、2026年招生计划缩招（竞争加剧 ）、考生总数小幅减少（竞争略缓）、学校声誉稳定且抖音高热、优势学科对工科考生的强吸引力，在2025年基准3917名基础上，预计2026年最低位次继续前移但幅度收窄；预测 最低位次约3706名，区间3261–4151名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工科试验班（AI加先进技术领军班）
- 工科试验班（机器人与智能装备拔尖班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 工科试验班（理工交叉卓越优才计划）（数学类）
- 软件工程（卓越优才计划）
- 工科试验班（未来信息）（2026年新增大类）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次在3706名左右，区间3261–4151名。位次在区间下限（3261名）以上可重点冲刺一档王牌专业（AI加先进技术领军班、机器人与智能装备拔尖班）；位次在3706名附近建 议以二档专业为主力（软件工程、理工交叉卓越优才计划）；位次接近区间上限（4151名）可考虑三档专业保底。2026年新增的未来信息/未来智造大类专业值得关注。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the science group (including Physics Category) were approximately 4864 → 4805 → 6481 → 5220 → 3917. In 2023, there was a significant backward shift (6481), rebounding to 5220 in 2024, and moving sharply forward to 3917 in 2025, showing a forward trend in recent years, with a baseline of about 3917 in 2025. The enrollment plan for this university in Anhui Province's science group: 107 in 2021, 107 in 2022, 104 in 2023, 124 in 2024, 146 in 2025, expanding year by year; the 2026 plan is 131, a decrease of 15 from 2025 (a reduction of about 10.3%), which will intensify competition and push rankings forward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Harbin Institute of Technology (Weihai) is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university, sharing the HIT brand. In the Soft Science China University Rankings, HIT ranked 12th in 2026, with a stable upward trend in recent years (11th in 2021 → 14th in 2025 → 12th in 2026), indicating a very high university level. In the fifth round of discipline evaluations, HIT (main campus) had 17 disciplines rated A- or above, including Mechanics, Mechanical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Environmental Science and Engineering (A+), as well as Computer Science and Technology, Control Science and Engineering, Software Engineering (A), etc., which are highly related to the enrollment majors at the Weihai campus, strongly attracting engineering candidates. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no significant negative public opinion impact. On Douyin, it ranks 10th in the overall popularity list (high heat), with high short video exposure, reflecting continuously rising attention for applications. In 2024, there was an abnormal signal regarding the admission score line, but no abnormal records in 2025, overall reputation is stable.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation were highly recommended/recommended from 2024 to 2026, with sustained high social popularity. In 2026, the total number of Gaokao examinees in Anhui Province is about 451,000, slightly decreasing from 462,000 in 2025. The estimated number of Physics Category examinees is about 309,000, a decrease of about 3.7% from 321,000 in 2025, slightly easing competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong forward trend of rankings in 2025, the enrollment plan reduction in 2026 (intensified competition), a slight decrease in total examinees (slightly eased competition), stable university reputation with high Douyin heat, and strong attraction of advantageous disciplines to engineering candidates, based on the 2025 baseline of 3917, it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will continue to move forward but with a narrowed range. Predicted minimum ranking is about 3706, with a range of 3261–4151.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (AI Plus Advanced Technology Leading Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Robot and Intelligent Equipment Top Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Science-Engineering Cross Excellence Elite Program) (Mathematics)
- Software Engineering (Excellence Elite Program)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Information) (New major category in 2026).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Manufacturing Excellence Elite Program) (New major category in 2026)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Science-Engineering Cross Excellence Elite Program) (Mathematics, only 6 spots in 2026 plan).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking around 3706, range 3261–4151. Candidates with rankings above the lower limit (3261) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (AI Plus Advanced Technology Leading Class, Robot and Intelligent Equipment Top Class); those around 3706 are advised to target Tier 2 majors as the main choice (Software Engineering, Science-Engineering Cross Excellence Elite Program); those near the upper limit (4151) can consider Tier 3 majors as a safety option. The new Future Information/Future Manufacturing major categories in 2026 are worth attention.
